articles.headline: World Cup Daily live: Canada first host eliminated, Cape Verde overshadow Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce wedding
articles.description: Enjoy all the features, news, video analysis and color from around the 2026 World Cup as the round of 16 begins.

images.name: Jonathan Osorio of Canada reacts July4-2026 [1296x729]
Morocco fans v Canada 260704 [1296x729]

articles.headline: Tim Ream: USMNT a 'true representation of what America is'
articles.description: USMNT defender Tim Ream said the diverse background of the players on the USMNT is "a true representation of what America is."

images.name: Ream: Pochettino has embraced American culture during World Cup
images.caption: Ream: Pochettino has embraced American culture during World Cup

articles.headline: Norway's Stale Solbakken denies disrespecting Brazil's Carlo Ancelotti before World Cup clash
articles.description: Norway coach Stale Solbakken said it is a "great honour" to face Carlo Ancelotti in Sunday's World Cup round of 16 tie against Brazil after rejecting claims he disrespected the Selecao coach.

images.name: Nicol not convinced Brazil will beat Norway

articles.headline: England hotel guarded by riot police in Mexico before World Cup clash
articles.description: More than 100 riot police in bullet-proof vests are guarding the hotel where England are staying before playing Mexico at the World Cup.

images.name: Harry Kane [1296x729]
images.credit: Photo by Eddie Keogh - The FA/The FA via Getty Images

images.name: England booed as they arrive at Mexico hotel
images.caption: England booed as they arrive at Mexico hotel
